gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT (navi14, LLVM 15.0.7, DRM 3.42, 5.15.0-58-generic)
notes:
When opening the game, a windowed black screen appears, then minimizes. Every attempt to open/maximize the window fails and it immediately minimizes again. Tried several Proton layers, no change. After several attempts to the Denuvo anti-cheat system locked me out from loading the game for 24 hours.

One time got the main menu to barely load, but the game crashed half way loading the main menu after the agreement screens. CPU pegs at 100% every time. Twice it froze my PC and I had to reboot via terminal.
title: Dead Space
